title: September 5
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 5''' is the 248th day of the year (249th in leap years). There are 117 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1910s#1914|1914]] – [[Stuart Freeborn]] is born.
*[[1930s#1934|1934]] – [[Marvin Goldhar]] is born.
*[[1930s#1942|1942]] – [[Werner Herzog]] is born.
*[[1960s#1960|1960]] – [[Kendra Wall]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 80|''Star Wars Weekly'' 80]] published.
*[[1990]] – [[Max Mittelman]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Star Wars: Dark Empire II (TPB)|''Dark Empire II'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The Art of Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace]]'' paperback published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars: Republic: Emissaries to Malastare (TPB)|''Star Wars: Republic: Emissaries to Malastare'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 53|''Star Wars'' (2015) 53]] published.
*2018 – [[Doctor Aphra Annual 2|''Doctor Aphra Annual'' 2]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Where's the Wookiee? 3]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[The High Republic: Tales of Light and Life]]'' published.
*2023 – [[The High Republic: Tales of Light and Life (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Tales of Light and Life'' audiobook]] released.
*2023 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Ahsoka vs. Maul]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: The Young Jedi]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Young Jedi Adventures: Yoda's Mission]]'' published.
*2023 – "[[Part Four: Fallen Jedi]]" aired on [[Disney+]].
*[[2025]] – ''[[Star Wars: Droid Diaries]]'' premiered on the [[StarWarsKids.com]] YouTube channel with "[[R2-D2 and BB-8's Messy Mission!]]".
